name: Astroneer
author: ops@refx.example
description: Space sandbox exploration. SteamCMD-installed dedicated server (Windows build via Proton).

installScript.script:
#!/bin/bash
# ReFx steamcmd shim — the steamcmd:debian/proton install image ships no
# `steamcmd` on PATH. Bootstrap SteamCMD and expose it on PATH so the egg's
# `steamcmd ...` calls resolve (otherwise the game server never downloads).
if ! command -v steamcmd >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd
  curl -sSL https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz | tar zxf - -C /mnt/server/steamcmd || { echo "ERROR: failed to fetch steamcmd"; exit 1; }
  chmod +x /mnt/server/steamcmd/steamcmd.sh /mnt/server/steamcmd/linux32/steamcmd 2>/dev/null || true
  printf '#!/bin/sh\nexec /mnt/server/steamcmd/steamcmd.sh "$@"\n' > /usr/local/bin/steamcmd
  chmod +x /usr/local/bin/steamcmd
fi
set -euo pipefail
mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server
steamcmd +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows +force_install_dir /mnt/server +login anonymous +app_update 728470 validate +quit
# Seed Astroneer AstroServerSettings.ini from panel vars.
mkdir -p /mnt/server/Astro/Saved/Config/WindowsServer
AINI=/mnt/server/Astro/Saved/Config/WindowsServer/AstroServerSettings.ini
if [ ! -f "$AINI" ]; then
  cat > "$AINI" <<EOF
[/Script/Astro.AstroServerSettings]
ServerName=${SERVER_NAME}
OwnerName=${OWNER_NAME}
ServerPassword=${SERVER_PASSWORD}
MaxServerFramerate=30.000000
MaxServerFramerateWhileEmpty=3.000000
PublicIP=
EOF
fi
echo 'Astroneer install complete.'

variables.description: Name shown in the in-game server browser.
Leave blank for an open server.

longDescription: Reshape planets and automate bases with friends on a dedicated Astroneer server.
